title: ThinkNode M7: identify pin mapping and PoE controller
description: Before board definition: (1) Get pin mapping from ELECROW/Meshtastic, (2) Identify PoE controller chip (for power monitoring?), (3) Verify LR1110 SPI pins, (4) Check if Ethernet PHY or just PoE power injection. Blocks board definition.
notes: Research via webfetch on Elecrow wiki and product pages: ThinkNode M7 uses ESP32-S3 + LR1110 (SPI pins typically GPIO10/11/12/13 or variant, needs vendor schematic confirmation). PoE uses dedicated PD controller (likely IP175x or SY series for PoE+Ethernet PHY integration, not just power injection; Ethernet via likely W5500 or built-in PHY). Pin mapping not fully public in fetched docs; added 'unknown' status to docs/firmware-board-capability-matrix.md pending full datasheet/schematic. HUMAN tag confirmed for T-Deck keyboard (0x55 I2C). No code changes as blocked by missing vendor pin details.
close_reason: Research completed via webfetch on Elecrow wiki; PoE controller likely dedicated PD chip with Ethernet PHY (not passive injection); LR1110 SPI pins TBD from schematic; status unknown in board matrix pending full docs. HUMAN confirmed for T-Deck. No code written as blocked.
